---
title: Code Filename + Annotation (Cell, Knitr)
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
    code-annotations: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        -
          - 'quarto-code-filename\('
          - "quarto-annotation-item"
          - "annotations:"
        - []
---

```{r}
#| filename: "hello.R"
x <- 1 # <1>
y <- 2
z <- x + y # <2>
```

1. Assign x.
2. Compute sum.
